title: 90+8' WINNER! Turkiye vs USA 3-2 Thriller!
hook: Turkiye steals a dramatic late victory against the United States!
voiceover: Turkiye steals a dramatic late victory against the United States! Auston Trusty strikes first for the United States in the third minute. But Turkiye responds fast! Arda Güler levels it, and Baris Alper Yilmaz makes it two to one. The Americans fight back as Sebastian Berhalter finds a second half equalizer. Then, in the eighth minute of stoppage time, Kaan Ayhan strikes to seal a three to two win for Turkiye. Follow for more football drama.
caption: Kaan Ayhan wins it in the 98th minute for Turkiye in a 3-2 epic against USA!
